themes.reasoning_notes: X-spell that scales with excess mana and converts it into direct damage to players or creatures.
Can kill one or more creatures by dividing damage among targets, though inefficient when split.
X damage to any number of targets is fundamentally direct-damage scaling; it often closes games or removes creatures while pointing damage upstairs.
As an X-spell, it does reward excess mana, but that is secondary to its core identity as scalable burn rather than a dedicated big-mana payoff.
